H1.name: Density strength > 0.50
H1.details: All sectors exceed 0.50 at all depths

H2.name: Density retention > 0.70
H2.details: Projection maintains > 0.70 through depth 20; antisymmetry through depth 16; neutral fails at depth 16

H3.name: Density dispersion < 0.30
H3.details: All sectors remain below 0.30 threshold across all depths; maximum dispersion 0.2001 at neutral depth 20

H4.name: RG stability > 0.90
H4.details: RG similarity peaks at 0.9698 (projection, depth 1); never exceeds 0.90 beyond depth 3; falls to 0.8345 at neutral depth 20

H5.name: All sectors nonzero density retention
H5.details: All sectors maintain nonzero density strength across all depths
